note: KEYSTONE root cause found (ADR-037): IEC cross-domain sampling skew — drive samples stale C64 DATA snapshot mid-bitbang (refreshed only on C64 $DD00 access). Underlies BOTH standard LOAD (byte 11 abort, drive $E961) AND custom loaders. Next: iec-crossdomain-sync [opus] — bidirectional cycle-exact cross-domain sync. THE heart of the IEC story.
followups: custom-loader-gate [opus] — ACID TEST: scramble_infinity.d64 ($DD00 bitbang + VIC raster sync, the user-flagged hardest case). Standard LOAD lands the bootstrap, then the loaded code installs the custom $DD00 loader for the bulk. Trace-diff vs TS catches 1-cycle desync.
